r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Finding effective products requires expensive trial and error
emotional_amplifiers: Have you ever noticed how topical cosmetic skin creams always talk about improving the 'appearance' of the skin or 'visibly' reducing wrinkles? They all contain wussy 'appearance' qualifiers, because none of them will claim they change the skin's structure (not even Estee Lauder or La Mer with its $300 wrinkle cream).
Topical wrinkle creams only affect 'appearance' - they can't change skin structure

unique_differentiators: Experts have curated the breakthrough products for each category

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Actual skin rebuilding, targeted fat burning, stress-cycle-breaking sleep

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: 4-star rating is for FORMAT innovation - the curated list approach
notable_elements: The SRSD naming convention creates a new category/condition
UniLastin's 'oral vs topical' countersell is effective positioning
Multiple promo codes allow response tracking by product
extraction_notes.key_insight: Product line DPS format allows testing multiple offers in one ad buy - the 'curated list' editorial voice reduces ad resistance while the variety increases relevance to diverse reader needs
